# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

# This is an example of a very minimal ARM template which creates the SQL Server, but not Advanced Threat Protection or auditing capabilities due to space constraints here and because it could lead into unnecessary costs for our startup's initial deployment only with basic security features.  You can add advanced threat protection (ATP) by uncommenting line "enableAdvancedThresholdProtection: true" at the bottom of this code snippet or in main template file if you have defined them elsewhere, and auditing enabled via adding lines similar to "# Enable Audit on Database Server".
--- 
New-AzureRmResourceGroup -Name '<your_resource_group>' -Location 'West Europe' # Replace with your resource group location. (Example: West Europe)  
$storageAccount = New-AzureRmStorageAccount -ResourceGroupName $rg.ResourceGroupName -Name ('<Your Unique Storage Account Name') –Location 'westeurope’# Provide a unique name for the storage account, replace with your own details and location (example: mystoreacct)
New-AzureRmSqlServer -ResourceGroupName $resourceGroup.ResourceGroupName -ServerName('your_server'sSQLdatabase1') –Location 'West Europe' # Specify server parameters  
$passwords = @{ name="<User>"; password=$password;}; Set-AzureRmSqlServerFirewallRule -ResourceGroupName $rg.name ,  $("allowAllIPs") ;# Add this line to allow all IP addresses via FireWall on SQL Server, replace <User>  with your own details and 'your_server'  as per you requirements
New-AzureRmDatabase -ServerName ('<Your server name>')   # Specify the database parameters. Replace "database1" & other placeholders in this template if they are not what is required here, replace <User>  with your own details and 'your_server'  as per you requirements
